name: Pastel Dots
description: Pastel dotted backdrop with pink pill, big rounded indigo headline, phone clipped at bottom. Adapted from a Sign PDF reference set.
decorationsHint: soft pastel polka-dot canvas, hand-drawn pink curls / arrows / halo circles around the device, bold rounded indigo type, candy-pink pill badge.
heroPrompt:
Design a high-converting App Store hero screenshot for {appName}. Goal: instantly communicate the main benefit in under 3 seconds.

App: {themeHint}.

Vibe: pastel polka-dot canvas (same hue as input), candy-pink accents, hand-drawn doodles around the device — curls, halos, sparkles, tiny arrows. Modern iOS marketing design — bold, premium, clean. Sharp lighting, soft shadows, lots of whitespace, strong visual hierarchy. Phone at a slight angle for depth (not flat). Glow / focus on the device. Make it instantly scannable at thumbnail size.

Composition: arrange every element with intentional spatial layout — anchor each ingredient in its own zone (corner, side, around the device), DON'T stack them vertically in a column. Use the whole canvas with breathing room. Phone is the focal point, decorations and ingredients are accents. Borrow shapes / colours / icons from elements visible inside the phone's app UI so the surrounding canvas feels like an extension of the app's visual language, not random stock graphics.

{extraPromptBlock}

Layout: the TOP 25% of the canvas is reserved for a headline overlaid afterwards — keep it clean dotted background, no baked text, no decorations there. The remaining 75% (from ~25% downward to the very bottom) is for the phone and decorations — use ALL of that vertical space with breathing room. Do NOT cluster everything in the upper-middle and leave the bottom empty; the composition should fill the canvas edge-to-edge.

Avoid: clutter, multiple focal points, boring flat backgrounds.
Quality: ultra-sharp, realistic lighting, premium App Store top-grossing-app feel.

IMPORTANT: Treat the inner phone screen as a fixed image. Keep its content exactly as in the input scaffold — do NOT redraw labels, buttons, list rows, status bar, icons, or any text inside the device frame. You may re-perspective the whole screen image to match the new phone angle, but pixel content stays.

samples.descriptor: Sign PDFs with finger or Apple Pencil.
Highlight, comment, fill — right on the page.
Offline signing. Zero cloud. No tracking.
